'''Stima Ardella''' was the leader of the [[Black Hammer pirates]]. Based primarily from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Galantos]], she terrorized the local [[Fian/Legends|Fia]], and was known to scour the [[Widek Bypass]] in her flagship, the ''[[Smokeswimmer]]''.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
